dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Cinacalcet tablets should be taken with food or shortly after a meal ( 2.1 ). Tablets should always be taken whole and not divided ( 2.1 ) Secondary HPT in patients with CKD on dialysis ( 2.2 ): Starting dose is 30 mg once daily. Titrate dose no more frequently than every 2 to 4 weeks through sequential doses of 30, 60, 90, 120, and 180 mg once daily as necessary to achieve targeted intact parathyroid hormone (iPTH) levels. iPTH levels should be measured no earlier th
